sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12821" key="a)po/khros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόκηρος</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κήρ</etym>) <sense id="n12821.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">free from fate</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">death,</tr_> prob.l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:147" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">147</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
